get.summary: args: lineal1, lineal2 - Returns a collection containing paths shared by the two input linestrings/multilinestrings.

post.summary: args: lineal1, lineal2 - Returns a collection containing paths shared by the two input linestrings/multilinestrings.

post.summary: args: geom, elevation_start, elevation_end - Returns the portions of a geometry that lie in an elevation (Z) range.

post.summary: args: input, blade - Returns a collection of geometries created by splitting a geometry by another geometry.

is_pro.description: True when the user has an active Sangam Pro subscription or early access grant.

pro_note.description: Free-text note for how Pro was granted (early_access, coupon code, payment reference, etc.)

life_stage.description:
User's current Ashrama / life stage. Universal key regardless of tradition.
   brahmacharya = student (0-25), grihastha = householder (25-50),
   vanaprastha = forest dweller / elder (50-75), sannyasa = renunciate (75+).
   NULL means the user has not yet selected a stage (skip Ashrama section).

gender_context.description: Practice path preference. female = Stridharma duties; general = default path. NULL = unset.

transliteration_language.description: Preferred script for transliteration (en for Roman, hi for Devanagari)

active_symbol_id.description: The ID of the sacred symbol (relic) currently active for the user profile.

consent_religious_data.description: Explicit consent for processing religious/spiritual data (GDPR Art. 9)

subscription_status.description: Canonical server-side entitlement state. Replaces ad hoc is_pro-only gating for production billing.

entitlement_source.description: Source of current entitlement truth, e.g. early_access, admin_grant, stripe:webhook, app_store, play_store.

show_sadhana_highlights.description: When true, this user's sadhana highlights (beads, streak, shields) are visible on their public profile.

id.description:
Note:

Note:
This is a Primary Key.<pk/>

transliteration.description: IAST romanisation for Sanskrit; helpful for non-script readers and STT comparison

language.description: ISO 639-1/3 language code: sa=Sanskrit, hi=Hindi, ta=Tamil, bn=Bengali, te=Telugu, kn=Kannada, ml=Malayalam, mr=Marathi, gu=Gujarati, or=Odia, awa=Awadhi, en=English

script.description: Writing system: Devanagari, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Gujarati, Odia, IAST, Latin

tradition_region.description: Geographic tradition: north | south | east | west | pan (pan-India)

text_category.description: Canonical text classification for corpus browsing

id.description:
Note:
This is a Primary Key.<pk/>

Note:
This is a Primary Key.<pk/>

Note:

rowFilter.kul_family_members.birth_place.name: birth_place
rowFilter.kul_family_members.birth_place.description: Place of birth for informative lineage tracking.

rowFilter.profiles.is_pro.name: is_pro
rowFilter.profiles.is_pro.description: True when the user has an active Sangam Pro subscription or early access grant.

rowFilter.profiles.pro_note.name: pro_note
rowFilter.profiles.pro_note.description: Free-text note for how Pro was granted (early_access, coupon code, payment reference, etc.)

rowFilter.profiles.life_stage.name: life_stage
rowFilter.profiles.life_stage.description:
User's current Ashrama / life stage. Universal key regardless of tradition.
   brahmacharya = student (0-25), grihastha = householder (25-50),
   vanaprastha = forest dweller / elder (50-75), sannyasa = renunciate (75+).
   NULL means the user has not yet selected a stage (skip Ashrama section).

rowFilter.profiles.gender_context.name: gender_context
rowFilter.profiles.gender_context.description: Practice path preference. female = Stridharma duties; general = default path. NULL = unset.

rowFilter.profiles.transliteration_langu.name: transliteration_language
rowFilter.profiles.transliteration_langu.description: Preferred script for transliteration (en for Roman, hi for Devanagari)

rowFilter.profiles.active_symbol_id.name: active_symbol_id
rowFilter.profiles.active_symbol_id.description: The ID of the sacred symbol (relic) currently active for the user profile.

rowFilter.profiles.consent_religious_dat.name: consent_religious_data
rowFilter.profiles.consent_religious_dat.description: Explicit consent for processing religious/spiritual data (GDPR Art. 9)

rowFilter.profiles.subscription_status.name: subscription_status
rowFilter.profiles.subscription_status.description: Canonical server-side entitlement state. Replaces ad hoc is_pro-only gating for production billing.

rowFilter.profiles.entitlement_source.name: entitlement_source
rowFilter.profiles.entitlement_source.description: Source of current entitlement truth, e.g. early_access, admin_grant, stripe:webhook, app_store, play_store.

rowFilter.profiles.show_sadhana_highligh.name: show_sadhana_highlights
rowFilter.profiles.show_sadhana_highligh.description: When true, this user's sadhana highlights (beads, streak, shields) are visible on their public profile.

rowFilter.scripture_chunks.transliterati.name: transliteration
rowFilter.scripture_chunks.transliterati.description: IAST romanisation for Sanskrit; helpful for non-script readers and STT comparison

rowFilter.scripture_chunks.language.name: language
rowFilter.scripture_chunks.language.description: ISO 639-1/3 language code: sa=Sanskrit, hi=Hindi, ta=Tamil, bn=Bengali, te=Telugu, kn=Kannada, ml=Malayalam, mr=Marathi, gu=Gujarati, or=Odia, awa=Awadhi, en=English

rowFilter.scripture_chunks.script.name: script
rowFilter.scripture_chunks.script.description: Writing system: Devanagari, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Gujarati, Odia, IAST, Latin

rowFilter.scripture_chunks.tradition_reg.name: tradition_region
rowFilter.scripture_chunks.tradition_reg.description: Geographic tradition: north | south | east | west | pan (pan-India)

rowFilter.scripture_chunks.text_category.name: text_category
rowFilter.scripture_chunks.text_category.description: Canonical text classification for corpus browsing

rowFilter.guided_path_progress.day_reach.name: day_reached
rowFilter.guided_path_progress.day_reach.description: Which day of the plan the user has reached (1-indexed). Incremented by the daily cron after each push is sent.

rowFilter.guided_path_progress.started_a.name: started_at
rowFilter.guided_path_progress.started_a.description: When the user first started this plan (set on upsert, not updated thereafter).
